search_signals.author: cryptodaaddy
search_signals.text: 62% of Polymarket is betting Bitcoin goes below $50K this year. I’ve been in this long enough to know that when the crowd reaches this level of agreement on the downside they’re usually early to be wrong. Majorities don’t make money in markets. Conviction backed by patience does.
